title: Hohenbergia platynema
taxonomy: Hohenbergia platynema is a species of plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This classification places it within the order Poales. The family Bromeliaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as bromeliads. Bromeliads are characterized by their unique rosettes of leaves and often epiphytic growth habit. Hohenbergia platynema is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.

intro: Hohenbergia platynema is a plant species native to the tropical regions of South America, belonging to the family Bromeliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues.
